notes: Eval 3 new_skill original run reported 3751709ms (anomaly - likely a framework reporting error). Re-run confirmed 79.7s. Timing replaced with re-run value.
3-part description (TRIGGER/DO NOT/OUTCOME) is a strong discriminator: new_skill passes consistently, old_skill never produces this format
Eval 4 (workflow structure) is the clearest overall discriminator: new_skill 100%, old_skill 50% - directly testing the structural fixes added in this version
Eval 1 new_skill saved SKILL.md outside run-1/outputs/ (at new_skill/ level) - recurring location issue worth monitoring
